name: k6-api-performance-framework
description: Performance testing framework for APIs using k6 + TypeScript

scripts.smoke: pnpm run build && k6 run dist/tests/smoke/gorest.smoke.js
scripts.smoke:local: pnpm run build && k6 run --vus 1 --iterations 1 dist/tests/smoke/gorest.smoke.js
scripts.load:moderate: pnpm run build && k6 run dist/tests/load/gorest.moderate.load.js
scripts.load:moderate:summary: pnpm run build && k6 run --summary-export reports/moderate-summary.json dist/tests/load/gorest.moderate.load.js
scripts.load:standard: pnpm run build && k6 run dist/tests/load/gorest.standard.load.js
scripts.stress: pnpm run build && k6 run dist/tests/stress/gorest.stress.js
